summary: Completed testing of GameCraft EDU - Login, JWT persistence, AI compile endpoint, and UI flows. All core features working correctly. JWT persistence issue from iteration_1 is now FIXED.

minor.issue: AI budget limit reached during testing (infrastructure limit, not code issue)

1_login_flow.details: User can login with test@example.com/test123456. Redirects to dashboard correctly.

2_jwt_persistence.details: After login and page refresh, user stays on dashboard (not redirected to login). Token persists in localStorage and zustand state.

3_ai_compile_endpoint.details: POST /api/ai/compile returns valid GameSpec JSON. Tested via pytest - successfully generated 'Multiplication Master Challenge' and 'Times Tables Challenge' games.

4_ai_game_creation_ui.details: Studio/new page loads, prompt textarea and Generate Game button present with correct data-testids. Button shows loading state 'AI is creating your game...' when clicked.

5_game_save.details: Game CRUD operations work correctly via API. Create, Get, Delete all tested and working.

context_for_next_testing_agent: JWT persistence is now working. AI compile endpoint works but may hit budget limits after multiple calls. Test user has no games currently (test games were deleted after testing). All data-testids are in place for StudioNew page.
notes: JWT persistence fix from iteration_1 is confirmed working - user stays logged in after page refresh
AI compile successfully generates valid GameSpec with questions, entities, scenes, and rules
API returns 403 (not 401) for unauthenticated requests - this is acceptable behavior
AI budget limit was reached during testing - 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.545, Max budget: 0.4' - this is infrastructure config, not code issue
